hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push|merge).* main'; then echo 'ERROR: Direct operations on main branch are not allowed. Use a feature branch.'; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)"'; then npm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'decks.ts'; then node -e "const fs=require('fs');const c=fs.readFileSync('src/data/decks.ts','utf8');const ids=[...c.matchAll(/id: '([^']+)'/g)].map(m=>m[1]);const dupes=ids.filter((v,i,a)=>a.indexOf(v)!==i);if(dupes.length){console.error('WARNING: Duplicate IDs detected in decks.ts:',dupes);}else{console.log('OK: No duplicate IDs found.');}" 2>&1; fi
